title: 10x lower costs. 2x faster performance. All with KubeDB.
tagline:
10x lower costs.
2x faster performance.
All with KubeDB.
description: DEDICATTED migrated from MongoDB Atlas to a self-managed MongoDB cluster on Kubernetes, powered by KubeDB. Zero downtime. Full control. Production-grade DBaaS anywhere.
company_note: IT service provider specializing in Data, AI, Cloud, Development & Consulting. Running production workloads on Hetzner Cloud Kubernetes.
customer_description: IT service provider specializing in Data, AI, Cloud, Development & Consulting. Running production workloads on Hetzner Cloud Kubernetes.
customer_status: Production MongoDB cluster running 24/7 since migration
value_props_description: Same experience as cloud DBaaS - but with full control, any cloud, any storage, and no lock-in.
compliance_note: Open-core · Apache 2.0 · Certified on OpenShift, Rancher, EKS, AKS, GKE & more
challenge_title: Database costs were eating the entire Kubernetes budget
challenge_summary: MongoDB Atlas costs were equal to (or higher than) the cost of their entire 25+ node Kubernetes cluster on Hetzner Cloud.
challenge_key_pains: Data consistency · Backup & recovery · Security · Zero-downtime migration · Infrastructure reliability

challenge_items.title: Sky-high managed DB fees
challenge_items.description: Atlas pricing + egress traffic made the database the most expensive part of the infrastructure.

challenge_items.title: High latency
challenge_items.description: Every request crossed external network boundaries, adding unnecessary latency.

challenge_items.title: Operational complexity
challenge_items.description: Manual backups, scaling, upgrades, and zero-downtime migration were painful.

solution_title: KubeDB: Production-grade MongoDB as Kubernetes-native DBaaS
solution_description: KubeDB automated everything - provisioning, high availability, backups with KubeStash, scaling, upgrades, and monitoring - directly inside their Kubernetes cluster.

solution_steps.title: Single-click provisioning
solution_steps.description: KubeDB turned a complex MongoDB ReplicaSet into one simple Kubernetes resource.

solution_steps.title: Built-in high availability
solution_steps.description: Automatic failover, PodDisruptionBudgets, and multi-zone placement.

solution_steps.title: KubeStash backups
solution_steps.description: Incremental, encrypted daily backups to Cloudflare R2, fully automated.

solution_steps.title: Zero-downtime scaling
solution_steps.description: Vertical and horizontal scaling without restarting pods.

solution_steps.title: Full observability
solution_steps.description: Native Prometheus metrics + pre-built Grafana dashboards.

solution_steps.title: Enterprise security
solution_steps.description: TLS, RBAC, network policies, and Transparent Data Encryption.

timeline_title: Zero-downtime cutover from Atlas using mongosync + KubeDB OpsRequest

timeline.title: mongosync for live replication
timeline.description: Real-time sync between Atlas and in-cluster MongoDB with zero data loss.

timeline.title: Vertical scaling on-the-fly
timeline.description: Used KubeDB OpsRequest to double memory during sync without restarting pods.

timeline.title: Cutover in minutes
timeline.description: Commit sync → update connection strings → traffic resumed with zero downtime.

results_metrics.label: Lower yearly database costs
results_metrics.note: Eliminated Atlas managed-service + egress fees entirely

results_metrics.label: Faster request latency
results_metrics.note: All traffic now stays inside the Kubernetes cluster

results_quote: We now have production-grade MongoDB with full control, at a fraction of the cost - all running natively in Kubernetes.

value_props.title: Kubernetes-native
value_props.description: Declare your entire database with simple Kubernetes resources. Fully GitOps ready.

value_props.title: Enterprise-grade security & HA
value_props.description: TLS, RBAC, automated failover, PodDisruptionBudgets, multi-AZ placement.

value_props.title: KubeStash backups included
value_props.description: Incremental, encrypted backups to any object store, S3, GCS, R2, or NFS.

cta_title: Ready to slash your database costs by 10x?
cta_description: Deploy production MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Redis, and 25+ other databases anywhere Kubernetes runs.
